noise_note: Q6 (-0.07pp) sits 3.07pp ABOVE Q8 (-3.14pp) on the same ladder — a 6-bit quant cannot genuinely beat the 8-bit of its own source. This reproduces the pruned ladder's non-monotonicity (noise_floor_finding) on a second independent checkpoint: single-seed rung-to-rung rho deltas at n=121 are noise. Q8's band 'failure' is therefore not treated as a real degradation signal; parse_fail remains the only tier discriminator observed to matter.
